outlook.volatilityExpectation: Expect low volatility and tight price action between defined support and resistance zones due to positive GEX, with pinning at the weekly gamma flip.
outlook.summary: Market is precisely pinned at the Weekly Gamma Flip (606.01). The 600 strike acts as a massive structural RESONANCE level, combining 0DTE, Weekly, and Monthly Put walls with the Monthly Max Pain. Heavy Call resistance is layered immediately above at 608 and 610. Expect tight consolidation with aggressive mean-reversion trading by market makers.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Massive Put OI across all three expirations (0DTE: 8514, WEEKLY: 19956, MONTHLY: 41260) combined with Monthly Max Pain. Skew is bearish, reinforcing this massive dealer anchor.
Weekly Gamma Flip is virtually exactly at the current spot price (606.09). Acts as the primary directional pivot for the current session.
CONFLUENCE: Strong Call OI in both WEEKLY (8594) and MONTHLY (25748) expirations. Marks a hard resistance ceiling above the current spot price.
CONFLUENCE: Heavy Call OI in 0DTE (4125) and WEEKLY (10725). Immediate friction level capping any near-term upside momentum.
CONFLUENCE: Significant Put OI in 0DTE (8829) and WEEKLY (5729). Forms a secondary safety net beneath the primary 600 support zone.
SINGLE EXPIRY (MONTHLY): Massive Put OI (228,957) defines the ultimate structural floor for the monthly expiration, heavily defended by dealers.
SINGLE EXPIRY (MONTHLY): Monthly Gamma Flip just above the spot price. Crossing this level shifts the monthly structural gamma positioning to positive.
SINGLE EXPIRY (MONTHLY): Heavy Call OI (36,117) defines the absolute upside limit and terminal resistance for the monthly options series.
